resultList.dtldesc: Elegant 3 BHK Duplex Apartment for Sale Overlooking Palm Beach Road, Navi Mumbai::::Experience luxury living at its finest in this beautifully designed 3 BHK duplex apartment spread across the 12th and 13th floors, offering panoramic views of the iconic Palm Beach Road. With premium fittings, ample natural light, and a thoughtfully planned layout, this residence is ideal for those seeking both comfort and sophistication in one of Navi Mumbai’s most desirable neighbourhoods.::::Property Specifications::This semi-furnished duplex spans two levels, featuring three spacious bedrooms, a large living room, and four modern bathrooms, one of which includes a bathtub for added comfort. The apartment showcases vitrified tile flooring throughout, ensuring durability and a sleek finish. The modular kitchen is equipped with fitted cabinets, a granite countertop, a steel sink, and provisions for a refrigerator, along with an exhaust fan for ventilation. The home includes two balconies—one on each level—offering serene views of Palm Beach Road. The apartment is east-facing, ensuring abundant natural light and positive energy throughout the day.::::The interiors are enhanced with fitted wardrobes in two bedrooms, two moveable cupboards, ceiling fans, and complete electric fittings. All bathrooms are designed with western-style fittings, and both hot and cold water provisions are available.::::Facilities::The property offers a secure and comfortable living environment with 24-hour water supply, reliable electricity with power backup, and round-the-clock security. Residents have access to a children’s play area, ensuring a family-friendly atmosphere. The building includes lift access and covered parking for residents, ensuring both safety and convenience.::::Locality::Situated in a prime section of Navi Mumbai, this home enjoys proximity to leading schools such as Orchid International School and DY Patil International School. Prominent markets like APMC Market and Vashi Market, along with shopping destinations including Inorbit Mall, Raghuleela Mall, and Palm Beach Galleria Mall, are all within easy reach. Renowned hospitals such as Apollo, Fortis, MGM, and Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital provide excellent healthcare access. Commuting is convenient with Vashi Railway Station and bus stand nearby, and an upcoming metro station will further enhance connectivity. The area is well-developed and offers a vibrant yet peaceful residential atmosphere, making it a highly sought-after location.
